meaning: n.突然,唐突,(举止,言谈等的)粗鲁无理
examples: The abruptness of her appearance at the meeting surprised us all.
My dear, forgive for my abruptness and frankness, forget my triviality please.
After these areas of his body, however, the difficulty increased with the abruptness of a coastal shelf.
These global giants usually reorder themselves at a glacial pace but sometimes, as in the volatile financial sector of late, with more abruptness.
